sentences.arabic: لَمْ يَنَمْ مَازِنٌ جَيِّدًا لِأَنَّهُ كَانَ قَلِقًا.
sentences.translation: Mazin nije dobro spavao jer je bio zabrinut.
sentences.translationEn: Mazin did not sleep well because he was worried.
In the morning he felt very tired.

sentences.arabic: نَصَحَهُ صَدِيقُهُ بِأَنْ يَبْتَعِدَ عَنِ الْهَاتِفِ قَبْلَ النَّوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Prijatelj ga je savjetovao da odloži telefon prije spavanja.
sentences.translationEn: His friend advised him to stay away from the phone before sleeping.

sentences.arabic: جَرَّبَ مَازِنٌ ذَلِكَ وَنَامَ بِشَكْلٍ أَفْضَلَ.
sentences.translation: Mazin je to isprobao i bolje je spavao.
sentences.translationEn: Mazin tried that and slept much better.

sentences.translation: Počeo je rano ići na spavanje i buditi se svjež.
sentences.translationEn: He started going to sleep early and waking up energetic.
